scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @skillbridge/shared build && yarn workspace @skillbridge/database build
scripts.dev: yarn build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c auto "yarn workspace @skillbridge/api dev" "yarn workspace @skillbridge/web dev"
scripts.typecheck: yarn build:packages && yarn workspaces foreach -A -t run typecheck
scripts.test: yarn build:packages && yarn workspaces foreach -A -t run test
